originalTitle: Reddit stock sinks on report it may not renew Google AI content deal
summary: Google's AI summaries have reduced traffic to websites from the search results page and Reddit is reconsidering the benefits of the deal, the Journal said.
content:
Shares of Reddit slid 8% on Wednesday after the Wall Street Journal reported the company has discussed shutting off Google's access to its content for artificial intelligence use.

Reddit stock is down roughly 25% year-to-date.

The two companies struck a deal in 2024 to allow the search giant to train its AI models on Reddit's content. But as Google's AI summaries reduced traffic to websites from the search results page, Reddit is reconsidering the benefits of the deal, according to the Journal, citing people familiar with the matter.

According to the report, the $60 million-a-year deal is ending soon, and the companies are in talks about potentially renewing the partnership.

A Reddit spokesperson told CNBC in a statement that the company is approaching negotiations "just like any business should, by focusing on doing what's best for Reddit."

"A lot has changed since those first deals were signed, but our goals are the same: making sure any partnerships drive our business and recognize the unique value of Reddit's data," the statement read. "There is a wide range of ways to do that; those are all things we'll discuss at the negotiating table."

CNBC has reached out to Google for comment.

The search traffic trend can be seen on other sites as well, with Politico's Google traffic falling 23%, CNN's falling about 25%, and Business Insider's dropping more than 85% between June 2025 and 2026, the Journal reported.

It's part of a patchwork of media and publishing companies that have reevaluated their relationships with the biggest AI giants, with some taking legal aim to protect their intellectual property as their sites have suffered lower search traffic.

Last year, Chegg sued Google in federal district court, claiming that its AI summaries of search results hurt the company's traffic and revenue.

In a statement to CNBC at the time, Google said the company "sends billions of clicks to sites across the web, and AI Overviews send traffic to a greater diversity of sites."

Google responded to the Wall Street Journal on Wednesday with a similar statement, saying that its AI features help creators and publishers grow their audiences.

Reddit has also had a similar partnership with OpenAI that allows for the ChatGPT maker to train its AI models on its content, as part of Reddit's data licensing business that helped fuel an earnings beat last quarter .

During the first quarter, the company blew past analysts' expectations after revenue jumped 69% from a year earlier, reporting earnings per share of $1.01 versus 58 cents expected, and revenue of $663 million versus estimates of $611 million.

"We have important partnerships with both Google and OpenAI," Reddit CEO Huffman told analysts on the earnings call. "Those are very meaningful to us, and I think it's mutual. We continue to value those."

The company is set to report its second-quarter earnings on July 30.
chineseTitle: Reddit 股价下跌，因有报道称其可能不会续签 Google AI 内容交易
chineseSummary: 《华尔街日报》称，谷歌的人工智能摘要减少了搜索结果页面的网站流量，Reddit 正在重新考虑这笔交易的好处。
chineseContent:
《华尔街日报》报道称 Reddit 已讨论关闭谷歌对其用于人工智能用途的内容的访问后，Reddit 股价周三下跌 8%。

今年迄今为止，Reddit 股价已下跌约 25%。

两家公司于 2024 年达成协议，允许这家搜索巨头根据 Reddit 的内容训练其人工智能模型。但据《华尔街日报》援引知情人士的消息称，随着谷歌的人工智能摘要减少了搜索结果页面的网站流量，Reddit 正在重新考虑这笔交易的好处。

据报道，这项每年 6000 万美元的交易即将结束，两家公司正在就续签合作关系的可能性进行谈判。

Reddit 发言人在一份声明中告诉 CNBC，该公司正在“像任何企业一样，专注于做对 Reddit 最有利的事情”进行谈判。

声明中写道：“自第一笔交易签署以来，发生了很多变化，但我们的目标是相同的：确保任何合作伙伴关系都能推动我们的业务并认识到 Reddit 数据的独特价值。” “有很多种方法可以做到这一点；这些都是我们将在谈判桌上讨论的事情。”

CNBC 已联系谷歌征求意见。

据《华尔街日报》报道，其他网站的搜索流量趋势也可见一斑，2025 年 6 月至 2026 年期间，Politico 的 Google 流量下降了 23%，CNN 下降了约 25%，Business Insider 的流量下降了 85% 以上。

这是媒体和出版公司重新评估与最大的人工智能巨头的关系的一部分，其中一些公司采取了法律措施来保护自己的知识产权，因为他们的网站搜索流量下降了。

去年，Chegg 在联邦地区法院起诉谷歌，声称其搜索结果的人工智能摘要损害了该公司的流量和收入。

谷歌在当时向 CNBC 发表的一份声明中表示，该公司“向网络上的网站发送了数十亿次点击，而人工智能概览则向更多样化的网站发送了流量。”

谷歌周三对《华尔街日报》做出了类似的回应，称其人工智能功能有助于创作者和出版商扩大受众。

Reddit 还与 OpenAI 建立了类似的合作伙伴关系，允许 ChatGPT 制造商根据其内容训练其人工智能模型，作为 Reddit 数据许可业务的一部分，该业务帮助推动了上季度的盈利增长。

第一季度，该公司的收入同比增长 69%，超出了分析师的预期，每股收益为 1.01 美元，预期为 58 美分；收入为 6.63 亿美元，预期为 6.11 亿美元。

Reddit 首席执行官霍夫曼在财报电话会议上对分析师表示：“我们与谷歌和 OpenAI 都有重要的合作伙伴关系。” “这些对我们来说非常有意义，我认为这是相互的。我们继续重视这些。”

该公司定于 7 月 30 日公布第二季度收益。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
